glosses.ja: 神経質な; 緊張した

translations.de: Ich bin vor der Prüfung nervös.
translations.vi: Tôi hồi hộp trước kỳ thi.
translations.nl: Ik ben nerveus voor het examen.
translations.hi: मैं परीक्षा से पहले घबराया हुआ हूँ।
translations.el: Είμαι νευρικός πριν από τις εξετάσεις.
translations.ja: 試験の前で緊張しています。

tokens.explanation: Auxiliary/copular form of the verb 'estar' in 1st person singular present indicative, linking the subject to the adjective.
Adjective describing a temporary emotional state of the subject.
Preposition expressing time relation; here it introduces the noun phrase.
Contracted preposition 'de' + definite article 'el'; functions as a preposition introducing the complement.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Mi hermana está nerviosa en la sala de espera.
sentences.reading: /mi eɾˈmana esˈta neɾˈβjosa en la ˈsala ðe ˈespeɾa/

translations.es: Mi hermana está nerviosa en la sala de espera.
translations.ipa: /mi eɾˈmana esˈta neɾˈβjosa en la ˈsala ðe ˈespeɾa/
translations.en: My sister is nervous in the waiting room.
translations.fr: Ma sœur est nerveuse dans la salle d’attente.
translations.de: Meine Schwester ist im Wartezimmer nervös.
translations.it: Mia sorella è nervosa in sala d’attesa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹在候诊室里很紧张。
translations.yue: 我妹妹喺等候室度好緊張。
translations.ru: Моя сестра нервничает в зале ожидания.
translations.pt: Minha irmã está nervosa na sala de espera.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi đang lo lắng ở phòng chờ.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is nerveus in de wachtkamer.
translations.uk: Моя сестра нервує в кімнаті очікування.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन प्रतीक्षा कक्ष में घबराई हुई है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest zdenerwowana w poczekalni.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου είναι νευρική στην αίθουσα αναμονής.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er nervøs i venteværelset.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya gugup di ruang tunggu.
translations.sv: Min syster är nervös i väntrummet.
translations.ro: Sora mea este nervoasă în sala de așteptare.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je ve čekárně nervózní.
translations.da: Min søster er nervøs i venteværelset.
translations.ja: 私の妹は待合室で緊張しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, subject of the clause.
Copular/auxiliary verb in 3rd person singular present indicative, linking the subject to the adjective.
Adjective agreeing in gender and number with 'hermana'; describes state.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article modifying the noun phrase.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase.
Preposition linking two nouns in a compound noun phrase.
Common noun modifying 'sala' to form 'sala de espera'.

sentences.target: No seas nervioso, todo va bien.

translations.es: No seas nervioso, todo va bien.
translations.en: Don't be nervous, everything is fine.
translations.fr: Ne sois pas nerveux, tout va bien.
translations.de: Sei nicht nervös, alles ist gut.
translations.it: Non essere nervoso, va tutto bene.
translations.pt: Não fique nervoso, está tudo bem.
translations.vi: Đừng lo, mọi thứ đều ổn.
translations.ar: لا تكن متوترًا، كل شيء على ما يرام.
translations.nl: Wees niet nerveus, alles komt goed.
translations.hu: Ne légy ideges, minden rendben van.
translations.pl: Nie denerwuj się, wszystko jest dobrze.
translations.el: Μην είσαι νευρικός, όλα πάνε καλά.
translations.nb: Ikke vær nervøs, alt er bra.
translations.sv: Var inte nervös, allt är bra.
translations.ro: Nu fi nervos, totul este bine.
translations.cs: Neboj se, všechno je v pořádku.
translations.da: Vær ikke nervøs, alt er fint.
translations.ja: 緊張しないで、すべてうまくいっています。

tokens.explanation: Negative particle negating the imperative clause.
Verb form in 2nd person singular present subjunctive used in a negative command.
Predicative adjective describing the implied subject 'tú'.
Indefinite/pronominal subject of the second clause.
Lexical verb in 3rd person singular present indicative, indicating progression or state.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, expressing manner/state.

sentences.target: El perro está nervioso con los truenos.
sentences.reading: /el ˈpero esˈta neɾˈβjoso kon los ˈtɾwenos/

translations.es: El perro está nervioso con los truenos.
translations.ipa: /el ˈpero esˈta neɾˈβjoso kon los ˈtɾwenos/
translations.en: The dog is nervous about the thunder.
translations.fr: Le chien est nerveux à cause du tonnerre.
translations.de: Der Hund ist wegen des Donners nervös.
translations.it: Il cane è nervoso per il tuono.
translations.zh-Hans: 那只狗因为打雷而紧张。
translations.yue: 隻狗因為打雷而好緊張。
translations.pt: O cachorro está nervoso com os trovões.
translations.vi: Con chó đang lo lắng vì tiếng sấm.
translations.nl: De hond is nerveus door de donder.
translations.hi: कुत्ता गरज से घबराया हुआ है।
translations.el: Ο σκύλος είναι νευρικός με τους κεραυνούς.
translations.nb: Hunden er nervøs på grunn av tordenet.
translations.sv: Hunden är nervös på grund av åskan.
translations.ro: Câinele este nervos din cauza tunetelor.
translations.da: Hunden er nervøs på grund af torden.
translations.ja: 犬は雷におびえています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the noun phrase.
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Copular/auxiliary verb in 3rd person singular present indicative, linking the subject to the adjective.
Adjective describing the subject's state.
Preposition introducing a complement expressing cause or circumstance.
Definite article modifying the noun.
Plural common noun serving as the object of the preposition.
